notes: Confirmatory between subjects comparison on blameworthiness for the distal agent Clark. Contrast type: CH - CC. Participants: included. Story family: pooled. Load condition: pooled. Analysis mode: raw_parametric. Transformation: raw untransformed values. The location statistic represented by the contrast columns is the mean difference. p_value_one_tailed assumes that the predicted direction is positive for the contrast named in contrast_type. Model formula: first_vignette_clark_blame ~ C(case_code_position_1, Treatment(reference='CC')). Covariance type: classical. Holm correction in p_value_holm is based on two-tailed confirmatory p-values.
